items.title: Rafael Nadal talks tennis prize money, his hotels, and what sports taught him about business
items.summary: Rafael Nadal opened his fourth Zel hotel as he expands into hospitality, education and sports after retiring from tennis.

items.title: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
items.summary: Death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela jumped to 2,595, as rescue operations continued after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.

items.title: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
items.summary: Nvidia says it will give start-ups the chance to swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits under a new program aimed at AI-focused firms.

items.title: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
items.summary: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.
